question: What is the deductible for the health insurance plan provided by GreenTech Inc.?
answer: The plan also includes a flexible spending account (FSA) option, which allows employees to set aside up to $2,500 per year for medical expenses. The plan, which is provided by Blue Cross Blue Shield, covers 80% of medical expenses, with a deductible of $1,000 per year.
answer_paragraph: Our company, GreenTech Inc., is committed to providing a comprehensive employee benefits policy to support the well-being and financial security of our employees. As outlined by our CEO, Rachel Lee, in her address on January 10, 2022, our benefits package is designed to attract and retain top talent in the industry. The policy is administered by the Human Resources department, led by Director, Michael Patel. The benefits package includes a range of programs such as health insurance, retirement plans, and paid time off. For instance, our health insurance plan, which is provided by Blue Cross Blue Shield, covers 80% of medical expenses, with a deductible of $1,000 per year. The plan also includes a flexible spending account (FSA) option, which allows employees to set aside up to $2,500 per year for medical expenses. In addition to health insurance, we also offer a 401(k) retirement plan, with a company match of 5% of employee contributions. The plan is managed by Fidelity Investments and provides a range of investment options. Our paid time off policy includes 15 days of vacation per year, 10 days of sick leave, and 12 holidays. Employees are also eligible for parental leave, which includes 12 weeks of paid leave for new mothers and fathers. Furthermore, we offer a range of other benefits, including life insurance, disability insurance, and an employee assistance program (EAP). The EAP provides confidential counseling services and support for employees dealing with personal or work-related issues. In terms of eligibility, all regular full-time and part-time employees are eligible for our benefits package, with the exception of temporary or contract workers.

question: How many days of vacation per year are employees eligible for?
answer: Our paid time off policy includes 15 days of vacation per year, 10 days of sick leave, and 12 holidays.

question: What types of fitness classes are offered by GreenTech Inc.?
answer: For example, our fitness classes include yoga, Pilates, and cardio kickboxing, and are held three times a week in our on-site gym.
answer_paragraph: As part of our benefits package, we also offer a range of wellness programs, including fitness classes, health screenings, and nutrition counseling. These programs are designed to promote healthy habits and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. For example, our fitness classes include yoga, Pilates, and cardio kickboxing, and are held three times a week in our on-site gym. We also offer health screenings, including blood pressure checks and cholesterol tests, on a quarterly basis. In addition, we provide nutrition counseling services, which include one-on-one consultations with a registered dietitian.

question: How many weeks of paid parental leave are employees eligible for?
answer: Employees are also eligible for parental leave, which includes 12 weeks of paid leave for new mothers and fathers.
